basics.name: Teja Jagarlamudi
basics.label: Undergraduate of Computer Science at KL University.
basics.summary: I build full-stack apps, experiment with ML, and lately got into backend systems like APIs, concurrency, and rate limiting. Also into data and how it actually works in real projects. Figuring things out as I go.

work.name: Self-Learning Journey
work.summary: Dedicated to self-guided learning in web development, with a focus on modern web technologies. Passionate about honing practical skills through personal projects and open-source contributions.
responsibilities: Diving into web development through self-learning
Creating personal projects to sharpen and level up coding skills
Exploring open-source tech and the FOSS ecosystem

education.summary: Pursuing Computer Science Engineering with a focus on backend systems and full-stack development.

projects.name: Task Manager Web Application
highlights: Built a task manager supporting 50+ concurrent users
Developed 10+ secure REST APIs with role-based access
Integrated Firebase Auth, reducing unauthorized access by 95%
Collaborated using Git and deployed on Firebase

projects.name: Distributed Rate Limiter & API Gateway
highlights: Implemented Token Bucket & Sliding Window (10 req/sec)
Reduced API abuse by 85% across multiple endpoints
Optimized system for burst traffic scenarios

projects.name: Focus Sentinel
highlights: Tracked browsing across 20+ websites per session
Added real-time alerts based on usage limits
